title: UnknownFacePlanche
description: One planche for the Unknown Face task. The patient sees a single face of a non-famous person and states whether they recognise it. The correct answer is always 'no' (is_familiar=false). Demographic fields support post-hoc bias analysis.

stimulus_id.description: Unique planche identifier. Format: UF_NNN (e.g. UF_001).

is_familiar.description: Always false for Unknown Face stimuli. Any 'yes' response is therefore an error (false positive).

face_image.description: Path to the face image, relative to stimuli/images/. Must use controlled neutral-expression photos.

age_group.description: Perceived age group of the depicted person. Balanced across the set to avoid age-related familiarity bias.

gender_presentation.description: Perceived gender presentation of the depicted person.

ethnicity_group.description: Optional broad ethnicity grouping for diversity-coverage checks (free text, site-specific vocabulary).

image_source.description: Dataset or source of the image (e.g. 'Chicago Face Database', 'local photo').

expression.description: Facial expression in the image. Neutral is preferred for clinical standardisation.
